# Vercel Labs Agent Skills

Selected reference skills from `vercel-labs/agent-skills`.

These are vendored for consultation by coding agents. They do not override this repo's `AGENTS.md`, `CONTEXT.md`, `docs/agents/codex-workflows.md`, or `docs/agents/coding-standards.md`.

Included skills:

- `react-best-practices`
- `web-design-guidelines`
- `composition-patterns`
- `react-view-transitions`
- `vercel-optimize`
- `writing-guidelines`
